notes.category_policy: 4 fixed categories: 0=生物名・分類群名; 1=研究手法・技術; 2=学問分野名; 3=その他の研究キーワード
notes.classification_policy: Each keyword was assigned by its primary research role in context: organism/taxon names→0; analytical, experimental, measurement, modeling, software, telemetry, sensing, robotic, and intervention terms→1; established academic or interdisciplinary fields→2; behaviors, biological mechanisms, anatomical/physiological states, concepts, contexts, and applications→3.
notes.deduplication_policy: Keyword order follows first appearance after normalization. Direct translation or orthographic duplicates were normalized in favor of Japanese or the more standard Japanese form: アニマルウェルフェア→動物福祉, 古典的条件づけ→古典的条件付け, 母仔関係→母子関係, 鳥→鳥類, 移動生態学→移動生態, Soldier crab→ミナミコメツキガニ.
notes.split_policy: The bundled item 集団現象・臨界現象・コントラリアン was split into three keywords. Terms where the middle dot is part of the term, such as 化学・光遺伝学, were retained as a single keyword.
notes.layout_policy: Coordinates use curated semantic anchors inside each fixed class rather than language-distance embedding. Subregions include taxa groups, image/tracking methods, computational modeling, molecular/chemical methods, experimental tasks, telemetry/sensing, engineering/robotics, ecology/behavioral fields, neuro/psych fields, evolutionary/genetic fields, social behavior, foraging/mating/defense, sensory/neural/cognitive terms, development/physiology/genetics, locomotion/biomechanics, parent/attachment, and context/application terms.
notes.update_summary: 380 unique keywords were retained after normalization from 569 normalized mentions. Cluster counts and mention totals were recalculated.
